calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:21am
Judge Pro Tem David Flesig, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause Called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant, Rick Kunz appears with counsel Lauren Jones;Respondent, Mark Ryser appears with counsel John P. Zanghi and witness Tim Little (painter). Parites previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

BOTH SIDE SUBMITTED TRIAL BRIEF

Respondent's Counsel Zanghi examines his client Mark Ruper.
Appellant's counsel Jones cross-examines Mark Ruper.
Judge Fleisig questions respondent's witness Mr. Little if the cost has been changed;
Counsel Zanghi examines Mr. Little; counsel Jones cross-examines Mr. Little.

Appellant's counsel Jones examines her client Rick Kunz.
Judge Fleisig asks a few questions to Mr. Kunz.
Counsel Zanghi cross-examines appellant, Mr. Kunz.
Counsel Zanghi examines Mr. Little and his opinion on the estimate of cost submitted by appellant's;

EXHR (A) BLUE BINDER (VARIOUS DOCUMENTS)
EXHR (B) DRAWING LAYOUT OF THE COTTAGE
EXHR (C) PHOTOS OF INTERIOR OF THE COTTAGE
EXHR (D) 3 PAGES - ESTIMATE COST FOR PAINTING JOB
EXHA (1) PICTURE OF BOOK SHELVES/STAND
EXHA (2) 2 PHOTOS OF PAINTED WALL
EXHA (3) APPELLANT'S ESTIMATED OF COST FOR PAINTING

closing arguments

11:25am

Matter is submitted. Newly evidence is retained.

Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To May-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
